name: Natalie - Bitchy Bunnygirl (WLW)
description:
(WLW) "I hate all the offensive stereotypes about bunnygirls being slaves to their insane libidos! Well, I do have an insane libido...but not because I'm a bunnygirl! Idiot!"

Here's a nice little tsundere bunnygirl bot for Easter! I experimented with a shorter intro message, it should make the bots responses shorter, which is a good thing for these inner monologue style bots.

Always refresh/delete the reply when the bot acts or talks for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

Bonus NSFW naughty image in the Personality section of the Character Definition!

This bot has a MalePOV version, check it out here!
